titleStmt.title: SII 24.255: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 255. (A.R. No. 359 of 1953-54.) IV PRĀKĀRA, WALL BEHIND ĀCHCHĀVAYYAṈ SHRINE, EAST OF THE MĒṬṬAḺAGI-YAŚIṄGAR SHRINE.

summary.p: Partly covered up by the flooring slabs and by the intercepting walls. Seems to record a grant by purchase of some tirunāmattukkāṇi land in Jagadēkavīra-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by Māṅgaḷūr Rudranārāyaṇa-bhaṭṭaṉ for supply of garlands to god Eḍuttakai-Aḻagiya-Nāyaṉār. In characters of about the 12th century.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
— tiruppatikoyil śrīkāriyaṅkaḷum samaya kāriyaṅkaḷum ceykiṟa Aṉaittukkottu kkaḷil nirvvāhakar OlaiBuilt in.
—ṅkalattu māṅkaḷūr rudranārāyaṇa bhaṭṭaṉ kaṇṭu Eṭuttakai Aḻakiyanāyaṉār ceṅka ḻunirt tiruppaḷḷit tāmam
—cellukaiyāle jagadekaviraccaruppetimaṅkalattut tirunāmattukkāṇippaṟṟiya Ātitta tevanallūr
—rūpāy kū 4 catirattu muṭukku Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattuk kiḻakkaṭaiya rūpāy 1pa paḻutai kāṇiyeṉṟu per
—iṉṉāḷ mutal kaikkoṇṭu tiru Oṭaiyāka Allit tiruppaḷḷittāmam Eṭut takai Aḻakiya nāyaṉār
—�ṇi vilaikku paṇam nūṟum Iṉnilattuk kaṭamai Iṟuppukku nūṟṟirupatu paṇamum Āka Irunūṟṟu Irupatu
—paṭi Irunūṟṟu Irupatum Oṭukkit tiru Oṭai tiruppaḷḷittāmamThe rest is built under.
Digital edition of SII 24.255 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
